info.title: Bureau of Economic Analysis
info.description: BEA provides access to critical economic datasets including GDP, regional data, international trade, and industry statistics.

get.description: Returns the list of datasets available from the Bureau of Economic Analysis.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

get.description: Returns the list of parameters available for a specified BEA dataset.

parameters.name: datasetname
parameters.description: Dataset name for which parameters are requested.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

get.description: Returns valid values for a target parameter filtered by other parameters.

parameters.name: TargetParameter
parameters.description: Parameter for which values are requested.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

get.description: Returns the list of valid values for a parameter within a dataset.

parameters.name: ParameterName
parameters.description: Name of the parameter whose values are requested.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

get.description: Returns BEA data for the NIPA dataset.

parameters.name: Frequency
parameters.description: Frequency of data. A = Annual, Q = Quarterly, M = Monthly.

parameters.name: Year
parameters.description: Year or comma-delimited list of years.

get.description: Returns BEA data for the InputOutput dataset.

parameters.name: TableID
parameters.description: Unique Input-Output table identifier. Multiple comma-delimited values are accepted.

parameters.name: Year
parameters.description: Year or comma-delimited list of years. Use ALL to return all available periods.

parameters.name: Year
parameters.description: Year or comma-delimited list of years.

get.description: Returns BEA data for the GDPbyIndustry dataset.

parameters.name: TableID
parameters.description: GDP by industry table identifier. Use ALL for all tables.

parameters.name: Frequency
parameters.description: Frequency of data. A = Annual, Q = Quarterly.

parameters.name: Year
parameters.description: Year or comma-delimited list of years. Use ALL for all years.

parameters.name: Industry
parameters.description: Industry identifier. Use ALL for all industries.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

get.description: Returns BEA data for the Regional dataset.

parameters.name: LineCode
parameters.description: Line code for the selected table.

parameters.name: Year
parameters.description: Year or range. Supports ALL, LAST5, LAST10, or comma-delimited years.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

429.description: Too Many Requests - rate limit exceeded

get.summary: Get underlying GDP by industry data
get.description: Returns BEA data for the UnderlyingGDPbyIndustry dataset.
get.x-ms-summary: Get underlying GDP by industry data

parameters.name: TableID
parameters.description: Underlying GDP by industry table identifier. Use ALL for all tables.

parameters.name: Frequency
parameters.description: Frequency of data. Underlying GDP by industry currently supports annual data only.

parameters.name: Year
parameters.description: Year or comma-delimited list of years. Use ALL for all years.

parameters.name: Industry
parameters.description: Industry identifier. Use ALL for all industries.
